title: cryptantha corollata subsp. rattanii
intro:
Cryptantha corollata subsp. rattanii is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae), specifically a type of annual or perennial herb. 
This plant is said to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. 
Research suggests that it may offer health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial activity, although more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy. 
In herbal preparations, Cryptantha corollata subsp. rattanii is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its usage is largely limited to traditional medicine and further scientific research is required to standardize its applications.
